253:38120.name: Enter the setting in
253:38120.characters: Enter the setting interface, check the identification record, close some function settings, and check the upgrade and current version.

253:38119.name: account and password
253:38119.characters: account and password to log in, and use the function of face recognition/temperature measurement

257:45393.name: A total of 90 experi
257:45393.characters: A total of 90 experience questions were sorted out in this test, and they were divided into 35 necessary, 31 important, and 24 general according to priority.

257:45386.name: In the unique cultur
257:45386.characters:
In the unique cultural environment of Japan, The alarm and prompt mode applied in China has caused disgust and panic among customers.
We need to create a more reassuring use environment, such as improving identification alerts, improving the privacy of identification information display, etc.

257:45383.name: Judging from the per
257:45383.characters:
Judging from the performance of the data, the main problem occurred in 3/7/10. The product is not easy to learn, and it is difficult to complete the whole process under the condition of independent operation.

The performance is better in functional design and requirements integration. The user evaluation score of 1/5/9 is much higher than the average level, and users also have good scores in terms of use intention.

257:45382.name: In this study, the S
257:45382.characters: In this study, the System Usability Score was 51.75
